steps.title: Identify the elements around the blank
steps.content: The blank falls between the adjective “American” and the proper name “Will Barnet”. The blank requires a common noun identifying the person's role or profession.

steps.title: Apply the rule for proper names following role nouns
steps.content: When a proper name directly identifies the person in a stated role, no punctuation separates them. “American artist Will Barnet” reads as direct attribution where the proper name is the essential identifier. The colon would introduce a list (not applicable here), the em dash would create emphasis or insertion (unnecessary), and the comma would suggest the proper name is an appositive restating the noun (redundant). That matches choice B — B is correct.
